name: pg-eddy
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl gnupg2
echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/postgresql-keyring.gpg] https://apt.postgresql.org/pub/repos/apt bullseye-pgdg main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/pgdg.list
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y postgresql-18 postgresql-server-dev-18 libpq-dev clang
